description: A Party account that is used for settlement purposes, like creation of a Settlement Statement, creation of a document for the Partner to do reconciliation, or the creation of a report for reconciliation against an incoming invoice.

externalId.description: External identifier for the settlement account specification.

id.description: Unique identifier for the settlement account specification.

charSpecId.description: The ID of the characteristic specification.

charSpecExternalId.description: The External ID of the characteristic specification.

validFor.description: StartDateTime must be earlier than EndDateTime.

startDateTime.description: Start dateTime of the time period. The value is inclusive, including the starting point of the interval. The pattern is based on the definition found at http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#dateTime.

endDateTime.description: End dateTime of the time period. The value is exclusive, excluding the ending point of the interval. The pattern is based on the definition found at http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#dateTime.

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure of the value.

comprisedOf.description: Child/Children of the characteristic value, if any.

charSpecExternalId.description: The External ID of the characteristic specification.

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure of the value.

comprisedOf.description: Child/Children of the characteristic value, if any.
